perturbation.original_text: C. Notwithstanding the above, no activity, venture, business or other pursuit of UTK, during the term of this Agreement shall conflict with UTK's obligations under this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: C. Notwithstanding the above, UTK shall make commercially reasonable efforts to ensure that no activity, venture, business or other pursuit of UTK, during the term of this Agreement shall conflict with UTK's obligations under this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the absolute prohibition on conflicting activities to a 'commercially reasonable efforts' standard, the contract introduces ambiguity. This creates a contradiction because the original language implies a guaranteed non-conflict, but the revised version only requires UTK to try to avoid conflicts. The 'commercially reasonable efforts' standard is subjective and open to interpretation. This contradicts the intended strict obligation in the original agreement by suggesting its discretionary.
perturbation.contradicted_text: INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR UTK shall be, and in all respects be deemed to be, an independent contractor in the performance of its duties hereunder. A. AVDU shall be solely responsible for making all payments to and on behalf of its employees and UTK shall in no event be liable for any debts or other liabilities of AVDU. B. UTK shall not have or be deemed to have, fiduciary obligations or duties to AVDU, and shall be able to pursue, conduct and carry on for its own account (or for the account of others) such activities, ventures, businesses and other pursuits as UTK in its sole, absolute and unfettered discretion, may elect. C. Notwithstanding the above, UTK shall make commercially reasonable efforts to ensure that no activity, venture, business or other pursuit of UTK, during the term of this Agreement shall conflict with UTK's obligations under this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that 'no activity...shall conflict with UTK's obligations', implying an absolute guarantee of non-conflict. The changed text weakens this to 'commercially reasonable efforts to ensure that no activity...shall conflict', creating a contradiction. This is because the new language introduces a level of discretion and subjectivity, while the original language implied a strict obligation. This creates a contradiction as defined by Omissions - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: VIII. CONFIDENTIAL DATA A. UTK shall not divulge to others, any trade secret or confidential information, knowledge, or data concerning or pertaining to the business and affairs of AVDU, obtained by UTK as a result of its engagement hereunder, unless authorized, in writing by AVDU. UTK represents and warrants that it has established appropriate internal procedures for protecting the trade secrets and confidential information of AVDU, including, without limitation, restrictions on disclosure of such information to employees and other persons who may be engaged in such information to employees and other persons who may be engaged in rendering services to any person, firm or entity which may be a competitor of AVDU.
perturbation.changed_text: VIII. CONFIDENTIAL DATA A. UTK shall use reasonable efforts not to divulge to others, any trade secret or confidential information, knowledge, or data concerning or pertaining to the business and affairs of AVDU, obtained by UTK as a result of its engagement hereunder, unless authorized, in writing by AVDU. UTK represents that it has established internal procedures for protecting the trade secrets and confidential information of AVDU.
perturbation.explanation: By modifying the first sentence by changing `shall not divulge` to `shall use reasonable efforts not to divulge` creates an in-text contradiction. The original implies a strict obligation, whereas the new phrasing only requires a reasonable effort. By removing  `warrants` makes it a statement of fact and not a guarantee creates an in-text contradiction. And by removing `including, without limitation, restrictions on disclosure of such information to employees and other persons who may be engaged in such information to employees and other persons who may be engaged in rendering services to any person, firm or entity which may be a competitor of AVDU.` it limits the scope and detail of established internal procedures, creating uncertainty and ambiguity. There is now a conflict between the general statement that internal procedures are established and the omission of specific protective measures. This makes enforcement problematic.
perturbation.contradicted_text: VIII. CONFIDENTIAL DATA A. UTK shall use reasonable efforts not to divulge to others, any trade secret or confidential information, knowledge, or data concerning or pertaining to the business and affairs of AVDU, obtained by UTK as a result of its engagement hereunder, unless authorized, in writing by AVDU. UTK represents that it has established internal procedures for protecting the trade secrets and confidential information of AVDU. B. AVDU shall not divulge to others, any trade secret or confidential information, knowledge, or data concerning or pertaining to the business and affairs of UTK or confidential information revealed by UTK obtained as a result of its engagement hereunder, unless authorized, in writing, by UTK. C. UTK shall not be required in the performance of its duties to divulge to AVDU, or any officer, director, agent or employee of AVDU, any secret or confidential information, knowledge, or data concerning any other person, firm or entity (including, but not limited to, any such person, firm or entity which may be a competitor or potential competitor of) which UTK may have or be able to obtain other than as a result of the relationship established by this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text states UTK 'shall not divulge', indicating a strict obligation, whereas the changed text uses 'shall use reasonable efforts not to divulge', weakening the obligation and creating a conflict. The removal of 'warrants' transforms a guarantee into a statement, creating an in-text contradiction. The removal of 'including, without limitation, restrictions on disclosure of such information to employees and other persons who may be engaged in such information to employees and other persons who may be engaged in rendering services to any person, firm or entity which may be a competitor of AVDU.' limits the scope and detail of established internal procedures, creating uncertainty and ambiguity. There is now a conflict between the general statement that internal procedures are established and the omission of specific protective measures.

perturbation.original_text: F. ASSIGNMENTS. The benefits of the Agreement shall inure to the respective successors and assignees of the parties and assigns and representatives, and the obligations and liabilities assumed in this Agreement by the parties hereto shall be binding upon their respective successors and assigns; provided that the rights and obligations of UTK under this Agreement may not be assigned or delegated without the prior written consent of AVDU and any such purported assignment shall be null and void. Notwithstanding the foregoing, UTK may assign this Agreement or any portion of its Compensation as outlined herein to its subsidiaries in its sole discretion.
perturbation.changed_text: F. ASSIGNMENTS. The benefits of the Agreement shall inure to the respective successors and assignees of the parties and assigns and representatives, and the obligations and liabilities assumed in this Agreement by the parties hereto shall be binding upon their respective successors and assigns; provided that the rights and obligations of UTK under this Agreement may not be assigned or delegated without the prior written consent of AVDU and any such purported assignment shall be null and void.
perturbation.explanation: By removing `Notwithstanding the foregoing, UTK may assign this Agreement or any portion of its Compensation as outlined herein to its subsidiaries in its sole discretion.` it removes an exception to the prohibition on assignment without consent. This creates an internal contradiction because the first sentence states assignment requires prior written consent, but the removed clause allowed for assignment to subsidiaries at UTK's discretion. The removal creates ambiguity about whether UTK can assign to subsidiaries, contradicting the original explicit allowance.
perturbation.contradicted_text: IX. OTHER MATERIAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS A. INDEMNITY. 1. UTK shall indemnify, defend and hold harmless AVDU from and against any and all losses incurred by AVDU which arise out of or result from misrepresentation, breach of warranty or breach or non- fulfillment of any covenant contained herein or Schedules annexed hereto or in any other documents or instruments furnished by UTK pursuant hereto or in connection with this Agreement. 2. AVDU shall indemnify, defend and hold harmless UTK from and against any and all losses incurred by UTK which arise out of or result from misrepresentation, breach of warranty or breach or non-fulfillment of any covenant contained herein or Schedules annexed hereto or in any other documents or instruments furnished by AVDU pursuant hereto or in connection with this Agreement. B. PROVISIONS. Neither termination nor completion of the assignment shall affect the provisions of this Agreement, and the Indemnification Provisions that are incorporated herein, which shall remain operative and in full force and effect. C. AVDU agrees that for a twenty four months (24) following the execution of this Agreement, AVDU shall not, without UTEK's prior written consent, directly or indirectly solicit for employment any present employee of UTEK, or request induce or advise any employee of UTEK to leave the employ of UTEK. In turn, UTEK agrees that it will not directly or indirectly solicit any present employee of AVDU. - 4 - D. ADDITIONAL INSTRUMENTS. Each of the parties shall from time to time, at the request of others, execute, acknowledge and deliver to the other party any and all further instruments that may be reasonably required to give full effect and force to the provisions of this Agreement. E. ENTIRE AGREEMENT. Each of the parties hereby covenants that this Agreement, is intended to and does contain and embody herein all of the understandings and agreements, both written or oral, of the parties hereby with respect to the subject matter of this Agreement, and that there exists no oral agreement or understanding expressed or implied liability, whereby the absolute, final and unconditional character and nature of this Agreement shall be in any way invalidated, empowered or affected. There are no representations, warranties or covenants other than those set forth herein. F. ASSIGNMENTS. The benefits of the Agreement shall inure to the respective successors and assignees of the parties and assigns and representatives, and the obligations and liabilities assumed in this Agreement by the parties hereto shall be binding upon their respective successors and assigns; provided that the rights and obligations of UTK under this Agreement may not be assigned or delegated without the prior written consent of AVDU and any such purported assignment shall be null and void.
perturbation.justification: The original text allowed UTK to assign the agreement or portions of compensation to its subsidiaries without AVDU's consent. The changed text removes this exception, now requiring AVDU's consent for all assignments. This creates a contradiction because Section IX.F (also the changed text) now states that UTK cannot assign without prior written consent, negating the previous allowance for assignment to subsidiaries, leading to ambiguity and a potential breach of contract if UTK attempts assignment to a subsidiary without consent.
